mechanics.excerpt: Iost leg reduces the charac ter'$ RFL half (round down); makes running; sprinting and evading movement impossible; ad cuts walking movement to one-quarter the normal speed: Note also that if the lost Mimo is replaced by tully func tional permanent prosthetic (Type 5), the loss is effectively cured_ and it is worth no Character Points_ OWNS VEHICLE Cost: Through inheritance, hard work or sheer luck the character actually owns his BattleMech (or other vehicle) if he spends a additional points on it.
